title: A large UFO followed a military aircraft near Maricá-RJ [1991]
excerpt: JUNE, 26th 1991. Time: 13:53. Duration: 10 minutes. Four military men of the Brazilian Air Force, when flying over the region of Maricá, in the State of Rio de Janeiro, observed an unidentified flying object with the shape of a “very large, pointed star, 8 to 10 times brighter than the VARIG [an airliner]”. Also […]
text_preview: JUNE, 26th 1991. Time: 13:53. Duration: 10 minutes. Four military men of the Brazilian Air Force, when flying over the region of Maricá, in the State of Rio de Janeiro, observed an unidentified flying object with the shape of a “very large, pointed star, 8 to 10 times brighter than the VARIG [an airliner]”. Also according to the reporting witness, the UFO emitted intense white lights, but after the Campos [RJ] region until it reached the Vitória [ES] region it turned red. The UFO moved at the same speed as the military aircraft, about 3NM [nautical miles] away, at an altitude of 1,000 meters a
summary: Four Brazilian Air Force personnel flying near Maricá-RJ tracked a bright star-shaped UFO for 10 minutes that paced their aircraft at 3NM distance and was photographed on Jun 26, 1991.
